_comment: Single source of truth for the Cannonballs! Resurrection trailer. build_trailer.py records each clip with the game's --record mode, concatenates them after a black intro, burns the text cards, and lays the music over the whole thing. Quick-cut island durations are computed to fill the exact music length (probed with ffprobe), so the trailer always ends on the winner-orbit finale at the final note.
_aspect: native 4:3 (game is 800x600); do not use 16:9 — it stretches the game

cards.text: The game ‘Cannonballs!’ from the early 2000’s was beloved by many. It has sadly been abandoned, and many have struggled to run it since.
